name: Coramitug ATTR cardiomyopathy phase 2 trial
summary: A 52-week phase 2 randomized placebo-controlled trial of coramitug in ATTR cardiomyopathy, mostly on background disease-modifying therapy.
population: 104 patients with ATTR cardiomyopathy, median age 77 years, mostly New York Heart Association class II and receiving background disease-modifying therapy

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Protein Aggregate Clearance because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers, function, and safety in 104 patients with ATTR cardiomyopathy, median age 77 years, mostly New York Heart Association class II and receiving background disease-modifying therapy. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
